title: Resolve remaining GitHub Code Quality findings blocking PR #121
description: Address unresolved GitHub Code Quality review comments on PR #121 (dev->main) in a dedicated dev-based fix branch, run targeted tests, and push for re-review.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented remaining Code Quality fixes from PR #121: (1) made guidelines validator module cache read explicit in MCP/tools/score/guidelines.py, (2) replaced unnecessary lambdas in plexus/cli/procedure/test_procedure_test_specs_cli.py with direct Mock / local helper function patches. Validation passed: pytest -q MCP/tools/score/guidelines_test.py plexus/cli/procedure/test_procedure_test_specs_cli.py (7 passed).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Opened follow-up PR to dev: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/122 (branch fix/pr121-code-quality-followups). Posted cross-reference comment on PR #121 so reviewers can track that the remaining findings are being addressed via #122.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Detected additional Code Quality note still flagging _VALIDATOR_MODULE. Applying a stronger fix: remove global cache variable and use function-level cache decorator for _load_guidelines_validator, then rerun targeted tests and update PR #122.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Addressed additional lingering Code Quality finding in MCP/tools/score/guidelines.py by replacing global module cache variable with @lru_cache(maxsize=1) on _load_guidelines_validator. Retested: pytest -q MCP/tools/score/guidelines_test.py plexus/cli/procedure/test_procedure_test_specs_cli.py (7 passed).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Confirmed: PR #122 merged at commit 44bc763b before follow-up commit f06d6531; therefore the global-cache removal fix is not in dev. Creating a new one-commit follow-up PR into dev.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Opened post-merge follow-up PR: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/123 from branch fix/pr122-postmerge-guidelines-cache. Includes only commit 76143e5b (remove _VALIDATOR_MODULE global, use @lru_cache). Validation rerun: 7 passed.
